title: Cyathocoma bachmannii
taxonomy: Cyathocoma bachmannii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It is further categorized as belonging to the genus Cyathocoma. This plant is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. Cyathocoma bachmannii is a type of grass that grows in a specific region with unique climate and soil conditions. It is considered an endemic species, meaning it is found only in a limited geographic area.

The plant's leaves are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
